judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high analyst conviction, though trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 4.6%; next earnings 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth 90.1% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Analyst growth estimates are extremely high for current Q (236.6%) and FY (300.7%).
Profit margin 17.7% and ROE 22.8% — strong profitability and returns.
Mean analyst target of $1104.68 suggests significant upside potential from current price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 156.13 and Price/Sales of 27.14 indicate a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 111.44 suggests significant leverage.
Free cash flow of $93.35M is modest relative to market cap.
Quick ratio of 0.94 suggests potential short-term liquidity constraints.

news.paragraph: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (LITE) is set to report its next earnings on May 5th, following a Q1 2026 report where it beat EPS estimates by 4.6%. With no other recent headlines, the upcoming earnings call is the primary catalyst for traders to consider. The market will be looking for continued strong growth and management's outlook for the current fiscal year.
